overall.description: First-person gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player character walking through shallow coastal waters at sunset. The scene features a warm golden-orange sky, palm-lined waterfront with neon signage, and the distant Night City skyline visible across the calm water.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal beach at sunset with distant city skyline

events.description: flock of birds flies across the sky from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through shallow water along the shoreline, heading toward the palm-lined waterfront

notable_agents.action: flock of birds flying across the orange sky toward the left

entered.detail: futuristic skyscrapers silhouetted against the sunset across the water
row of palm trees along the elevated concrete seawall
commercial building with bright purple neon signage reading TENQU
concrete barrier wall separating the beach from the upper promenade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a tranquil coastal scene at sunset, with the player walking through shallow water along a beach. The distant Night City skyline glows against the orange sky while palm trees line the right side. A flock of birds flies across the sky as the camera moves steadily forward.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the shoreline, moving closer to the palm trees and neon-lit structures

segments.scene_description: The player continues walking forward along the coast, approaching the palm tree line and the neon-lit TENQU building. The birds have flown out of view, and the distant city skyline shifts to the left as the camera advances. The palm trees and waterfront structures grow larger in the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a tranquil coastline that shifts from an open vista of the horizon toward the neon-lit architecture of the waterfront. It begins with the camera wading through shallow beach waters under a glowing orange sunset, while a flock of birds crosses a sky dominated by the distant Night City skyline. As the camera advances, the city skyline gradually shifts to the left and the open water recedes. The scene then closes in on the shoreline, where the palm trees and the neon signage of the TENQU building grow larger and more prominent in the frame.
